narrative:
Olmsted Falls-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 901 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
